title: Business Case
text:
Business Case

Strategic Alignment
Current systems suffer from data leakage and high latency. This package utilizes Natural Language Processing for data validation and optimized Computer Vision pipelines to mitigate these risks.


ROI Estimate
Expected 25% reduction in compute costs through optimized ETL pipelines using Redis Streams.

title: Requirements Documentation
text:
Requirements Documentation

Functional Requirements

The system shall support asynchronous inference.
The system shall integrate with Redis Streams for real-time ETL.



Non-Functional Requirements

Latency must be deterministic.
Model weight loading must happen in < 5 seconds.

title: Work Breakdown Structure (WBS)
text:
Work Breakdown Structure (WBS)





graph TD
    Root[CV Engine] --> Ingest[Data Ingestion]
    Root --> Core[Model Core]
    Root --> Ops[Deployment/Mlopps]
    
    Ingest --> Kafka[Kafka Connect]
    Ingest --> Redis[Redis Streams]
    
    Core --> Optim[Quantization]
    Core --> Viz[Grad-CAM Module]

title: Value Stream Mapping
text:
Value Stream Mapping
This document maps our technical tasks to business value.

Ingestion (Kafka/Redis): Enables real-time responsiveness.
Preprocessing: Reduces noise, increasing safety accuracy.
Inference (PyTorch/TF): The core value-add.

title: Product Backlog
text:
Product Backlog

Epic: Real-time Pipeline Stabilization

Story: As a dev, I need a Redis sink for processed metadata.

Epic: Explainability Features

Story: As a user, I want heatmaps on detection failures.

title: Product Roadmap
text:
Product Roadmap

Q1: Core Engine & Kafka Integration.
Q2: Optimization for Edge Devices (Quantization).
Q3: Advanced Visualization and NLP-based filtering.

title: Project Charter
text:
Project Charter
Project Name: CV-Engine-Alpha
Project Manager: Rodrigo Souza dos Santos
Sponsor: Tech Operations Dept.

High-Level Requirements

Real-time processing via Kafka.
Support for Grad-CAM visualizations.
Modular architecture (PyTorch and TensorFlow).
